params.name: filter
params.description: Pre-defined filter to apply. Options include new_and_my_open, watching, spam, deleted.

params.name: email
params.description: Filter tickets by requester email address.

params.name: updated_since
params.description: Return tickets updated since the given date-time in UTC format.

params.name: include
params.description: Include additional information such as requester, stats, or description.

items.docs: Retrieves a paginated list of tickets from the helpdesk. By default, only tickets that have not been deleted or marked as spam are returned. Use filter query parameters to narrow results by status, requester, agent, group, or updated date.
Creates a new support ticket. At minimum, a requester identifier (email, phone, requester_id, or twitter_id) and a subject or description must be provided.

params.name: include
params.description: Include additional information in the response.

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a specific ticket by its ID, including all standard and custom fields.
Updates the properties of an existing ticket. Only the fields provided in the request body will be updated.
Soft-deletes a ticket, moving it to the trash. The ticket can be restored later using the restore endpoint.
Restores a previously soft-deleted ticket from the trash.
Creates a new outbound email ticket, allowing agents to initiate email conversations with customers.
Retrieves the list of agents watching the specified ticket.
Adds the authenticated agent as a watcher on the specified ticket.
Retrieves tickets associated with the specified tracker ticket.
Merges one or more secondary tickets into a primary ticket. The secondary tickets are closed and their conversations are added to the primary ticket.
Updates properties on multiple tickets at once.
Soft-deletes multiple tickets at once, moving them to the trash.
Retrieves all default and custom ticket fields.
Retrieves all conversations (replies and notes) associated with the specified ticket.
Adds a reply to the specified ticket. The reply is sent as an email to the requester and any CC'd addresses.

info.name: Create a note on a ticket

items.docs: Adds an internal or public note to the specified ticket. Private notes are visible only to agents.
Forwards the specified ticket to one or more email addresses.
Updates the body of an existing conversation (reply or note).
Deletes a conversation (note) from a ticket. Only notes can be deleted; replies cannot be removed.

info.name: List time entries for a ticket

items.docs: Retrieves all time entries associated with the specified ticket.
Adds a new time entry to the specified ticket to track agent effort.
Retrieves all time entries across all tickets, with optional filters.

params.name: time_entry_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the time entry.

items.docs: Updates the properties of an existing time entry.

params.name: time_entry_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the time entry.

items.docs: Deletes a time entry from a ticket.

params.name: time_entry_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the time entry.

items.docs: Starts or stops the timer on a time entry.
Creates a satisfaction rating for the specified ticket.

params.name: created_since
params.description: Return ratings created since the given date-time.

items.docs: Retrieves all satisfaction ratings across tickets, with optional filters for date range and satisfaction score.
Retrieves a paginated list of contacts. Contacts can be filtered by email, phone, mobile, company, or state.
Creates a new contact in the helpdesk. At minimum, an email, phone, mobile, or twitter_id must be provided.
Retrieves the details of a specific contact by ID.
Updates the properties of an existing contact.
Soft-deletes a contact. The contact can be restored later.
Restores a previously soft-deleted contact.
Merges secondary contacts into a primary contact. The secondary contacts are deleted and their tickets are reassigned to the primary.
Initiates an export of contacts and returns a job ID to check status.
Retrieves all default and custom contact fields.
Retrieves a paginated list of companies.
Creates a new company in the helpdesk.
Retrieves the details of a specific company by ID.
Updates the properties of an existing company.
Deletes a company from the helpdesk.
Retrieves all default and custom company fields.
Retrieves a paginated list of agents. Agents can be filtered by email, phone, mobile, or state.
Retrieves the details of a specific agent by ID.
Updates the properties of an existing agent.
Deletes an agent from the helpdesk. The agent's tickets will need to be reassigned.
Retrieves a paginated list of agent groups.
Creates a new agent group in the helpdesk.
Retrieves the details of a specific group by ID.
Updates the properties of an existing group.
Deletes a group from the helpdesk.
Retrieves a list of all roles defined in the helpdesk.
Retrieves the details of a specific role by ID.
Retrieves a paginated list of products.
Retrieves the details of a specific product by ID.
Creates a new product in the helpdesk.
Updates the properties of an existing product.
Retrieves a list of all email mailbox configurations.

params.name: email_config_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the email configuration.

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a specific email configuration by ID.
Retrieves a list of all SLA policies defined in the helpdesk.

params.name: sla_policy_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the SLA policy.

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a specific SLA policy by ID.
Retrieves a list of all business hour schedules.

params.name: business_hour_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the business hour schedule.

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a specific business hour schedule by ID.
Retrieves a list of all solution categories in the knowledge base.
Creates a new solution category in the knowledge base.

params.name: category_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the solution category.

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a specific solution category by ID.

params.name: category_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the solution category.

items.docs: Updates the properties of an existing solution category.

params.name: category_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the solution category.

items.docs: Deletes a solution category and all its folders and articles.

info.name: List solution folders in a category

params.name: category_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the solution category.

items.docs: Retrieves all solution folders within the specified category.

params.name: category_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the solution category.

items.docs: Creates a new solution folder within the specified category.

params.name: folder_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the solution folder.

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a specific solution folder by ID.

params.name: folder_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the solution folder.

items.docs: Updates the properties of an existing solution folder.

params.name: folder_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the solution folder.

items.docs: Deletes a solution folder and all its articles.

info.name: List solution articles in a folder

params.name: folder_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the solution folder.

items.docs: Retrieves all solution articles within the specified folder.

params.name: folder_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the solution folder.

items.docs: Creates a new solution article within the specified folder.

params.name: article_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the solution article.

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a specific solution article by ID.

params.name: article_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the solution article.

items.docs: Updates the properties of an existing solution article.

params.name: article_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the solution article.

items.docs: Deletes a solution article from the knowledge base.

params.name: query
params.description: Search query using Freshdesk query language, e.g. "priority:1 AND status:2".

items.docs: Searches for tickets using Freshdesk query language. Supports filtering by any ticket field using a SQL-like query syntax.

params.name: query
params.description: Search query using Freshdesk query language.

items.docs: Searches for contacts using Freshdesk query language.

params.name: query
params.description: Search query using Freshdesk query language.

items.docs: Searches for companies using Freshdesk query language.
